name: Portuguese Chickpea Salad with Roasted Garlic
recipeIngredient: 1 head of garlic (with papery outer husks removed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Slice off the top quarter of the head of garlic, exposing the cloves.
3. Wrap the garlic in foil and place it in a small baking dish.
4. Roast the garlic until it is buttery soft and tender, about 30 to 40 minutes.
5. Allow the garlic to cool for 10 minutes before handling.
6. In a serving bowl, mix the chickpeas with basil and balsamic vinegar.
7. Set aside.
8. When the roasted garlic is cool enough to handle, squeeze out each clove into the bean mixture.
9. Stir well to coat the beans thoroughly.
10. Add diced tomatoes and stir again.
11. Season with ground cumin, salt, and pepper.
12. Serve at room temperature.
Source: 365 Ways to Cook Vegetarian, Harper Collins, 1994
